title: Disturbances and 127 arrests mar Paris party after PSG Champions League victory
summary_full: Fans took to the streets to celebrate the Paris team's qualification for the final, but celebrations were marred by disturbances.
summary_public: Fans took to the streets to celebrate the Paris team's qualification for the final, but celebrations were marred by disturbances.
